name: PET-CT Whole Body
description: Whole-body PET-CT for oncologic staging and evaluation

findings.technique: Whole-body PET-CT was performed with FDG.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Head and Neck
sections.content: Head and neck [no FDG-avid lesions]. No pathologic lymph nodes.

sections.name: Chest
sections.content: Chest [no FDG-avid pulmonary nodules / no mediastinal lymphadenopathy].

sections.name: Abdomen and Pelvis
sections.content: Abdomen and pelvis [no FDG-avid masses / no organ involvement].

impression:
1. No evidence of FDG-avid malignancy.
2. Normal whole-body PET-CT.
